docs.hero.lead: OpenGraphite.app, OpenGraphite.css, ogkiln, and MCP treat HTML as the source of truth, not a generated artifact. Visual, CLI, and AI edits converge into the same files.
docs.hero.title: The repository and AI edit the same surface.
docs.list.app.body: It resolves HTML and CSS from `.ogp`, then edits through Canvas, Layers, and Inspector. External changes are detected so the view follows the same source.
docs.list.app.title: OpenGraphite.app
docs.list.cli.body: `ogkiln` provides structure inspection, validation, node-level edits, page placement, and canvas/page/node screenshots in one command system.
docs.list.cli.title: OpenGraphite CLI
docs.list.css.body: It reads `data-og-type`, `data-og-layout`, `data-og-role`, and `--og-*` variables so HTML can be displayed directly as a design artifact.
docs.list.css.title: OpenGraphite.css
docs.list.mcp.body: It exposes resources and tools to AI clients, while write and screenshot tools pass through the same validation and rendering path as `ogkiln`.
docs.list.mcp.title: OpenGraphite MCP
docs.stack.label: Source editing surfaces
downloads.build.body: A local build lets OpenGraphite.app and the CLI operate against the same worktree.
downloads.build.title: Build locally
downloads.hero.lead: OpenGraphite evolves around the HTML, CSS, and Swift code in the repository. The latest CLI, MCP, and OpenGraphite.css are available from the GitHub repository.
downloads.hero.title: Start from source.
downloads.repository.body: The repository contains OpenGraphite.app, OpenGraphite.css, ogkiln, and the MCP server source. The HTML used for AI collaboration lives in the same repo.
downloads.repository.title: Repository
home.component.build.body: The same component masters can produce static HTML, so public assets can be rebuilt without relying on JS.
home.component.build.title: Expand with ogkiln build for distribution.
home.component.runtime.body: OpenGraphite.runtime.js loads component masters so Pages source HTML can stay as lightweight og-instance references.
home.component.runtime.title: Keep small deployments light with JS references.
home.component.title: Edit Components with the CLI; Pages hold only references.
home.hero.lead: OpenGraphite is an interface for apps, CLI, MCP, and AI agents to view and edit the same HTML and CSS. It works only with the visible `.ogp` pages, so the active scope stays explicit.
home.hero.scope: HTML / CSS source -> .ogp pages -> App / ogkiln / MCP
home.hero.title:
Edit the same HTML
with AI.
home.preview.title: OpenGraphite workspace
home.principles.agent.body: `data-og-id`, `data-og-type`, and `--og-*` variables let AI edit safely at node level.
home.principles.agent.title: AI does not misread the target
home.principles.runtime.body: `ogkiln` and OpenGraphite MCP use the same validation path, converging human and AI edits into the same files.
home.principles.runtime.title: Reproducible with CLI/MCP
home.principles.source.body: Edits made in OpenGraphite.app sync to the open HTML itself, not to an export copy.
home.principles.source.title: HTML is the source of truth
home.principles.title: Share only the visible files with AI.
